name: Beef Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the flank steak in the freezer for about half an hour, just until firm.
2. Slice the steak across the grain into strips that are about 1/4-inch thick.
3. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients and marinate the steak strips for at least 2 hours.
4. Place the marinated slices on a rack in a pan.
5. Dry the slices in an oven set to 150 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 hours.
